SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript: SELECT cdiAlertWorkflowStatusDescription ,cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID ,hashKey FROM( SELECT CDIAlertStatusDesc AS cdiAlertWorkflowStatusDescription ,CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID AS cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID ,hash(concat(IfNull(CDIAlertStatusDesc,"") ,"|",IfNull(CDIAlertWorkflowStatusID,""))) AS hashKey FROM CDIAlertWorkflowStatus)
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript: MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s ON IfNull(s.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID,"")=IfNull(t.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID,"") WHEN MATCHED AND t.hashKey <> s.hashKey THEN  UPDATE SET  cdiAlertWorkflowStatusDescription = s.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusDescription ,cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID = s.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID , updatedDateTime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,hashKey = s.hashKey WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN  INSERT(cdiAlertWorkflowStatusDescription ,cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID ,createdDateTime ,updatedDateTime , hashKey) VALUES ( s.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusDescription ,s.cdiAlertWorkflowStatusID, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, s.hashKey)
